description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a smooth, polished finish and a contoured cheek rest at the rear. The barrel is long and slender, constructed from dark metal, and is complemented by a visible under-barrel component, likely an air cylinder or magazine, attached beneath. The receiver area includes a trigger guard and a metallic trigger, with a small, raised sighting system mounted on top. The fore-end is reinforced with additional metal bands and fittings, providing structural integrity and a secure grip. The coloration is a mix of natural wood tones and matte black metal, with some green and orange accent details. The overall design suggests a precision or sporting rifle, suitable for controlled, accurate shooting in urban or recreational environments.
description: A long, wooden-stocked rifle with a dark metal barrel, under-barrel component, and small raised sight, featuring green and orange accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, metal barrel, under-barrel component, and sight details.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening, under-barrel attachment, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal barrel, and under-barrel component from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the barrel and under-barrel component.
